CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, str VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str) VALUES (1, 'Hello World');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str) VALUES (2, 'Virtuoso Database');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str) VALUES (3, 'Test String Function');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str) VALUES (5, NULL);
SELECT left(str, 5) AS left_substring FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT left(str, 15) AS left_substring FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT left(str, 3) AS left_substring FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT left(str, 0) AS left_substring FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT left(COALESCE(str, ''), 5) AS left_substring FROM test_strings WHERE id = 5;
SELECT id, left(str, CASE WHEN LENGTH(str) < 8 THEN LENGTH(str) ELSE 8 END) AS left_segment FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE additional_strings (id INT, str VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO additional_strings (id, str) VALUES (1, 'Example String 1');
INSERT INTO additional_strings (id, str) VALUES (2, 'Example String 2');
SELECT a.id, left(a.str, 12) AS left_sub_from_a, left(b.str, 12) AS left_sub_from_b FROM test_strings a JOIN additional_strings b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT left((SELECT str FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2), 10) AS nested_left_substring;
